mapper.sql: id, scenic_id, scenic_name, people_num, `time`, prov_id, prov_name, date_log, date_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into jzgyd_province_passenger_source (id, scenic_id, scenic_name, people_num, `time`, prov_id, prov_name, date_log, date_type, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.scenicId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.scenicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.provId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.provName,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.dateLog,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.dateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update people_num = values(people_num), update_time = sysdate()
